results.name: weaker in singleton formats
results.description: Cards that have reduced use in formats that do not allow more than one card with the same name to be used, such as in Commander or Highlander.

results.name: weapon pointed
results.description: Pointing your weapon at someone or something.

results.name: web
results.description: A substance generally woven by spiders to catch prey

results.name: wedgeland
results.description: Lands that produce mana from a "wedge" (2 allied colours and their shared enemy)

results.name: weeping angel
results.description: A quantum-locked species that freezes and takes on the appearance of a stone angel when observed.

results.name: werewolf mechanic
results.description: Going a turn without casting spells transforms this to its back face. Casting two spells in a turn returns it to the front face. This also includes permanents that use the Daybound and Nightbound keywords to transform (see [day/night](day-night)).

results.name: wester drumlins
results.description: An abandoned estate featured in the Doctor Who episode "Blink"

results.name: western air temple
results.description: That's the one with the upside-down buildings.

results.name: westvale cult symbol
results.description: The open-circle with three hooked tendrils symbol used by the Westvale Cult on Innistrad, which represents the coming of Emrakul.

results.name: wheel
results.description: Discard your hand, draw back up.

results.name: wheel-symmetrical
results.description: Wheel effects that effect each player, sometimes with no choice on whether they want to or not.

results.name: wheel-symmetrical-optional
results.description: Each player can choose whether to wheel or not

results.name: whirlpool
results.description: Wheeling to the library.

results.name: white dragon (dnd)
results.description: A species of arctic dragon from Dungeons and Dragons, known for its ferocious nature and deadly ice breath.

results.name: white effect
results.description: Effects which are iconically white.

results.name: white elephant
results.description: Permanents that can be given to opponents and have detrimental effects.

results.name: white eye
results.description: Pure white eyes and sclera.

results.name: white jungle
results.description: An action stage from Sonic Adventure 2.

results.name: white mage (final fantasy)
results.description: Healing Job, typically associated with the Cleric subtype in Magic: The Gathering.

results.name: white plume mountain
results.description: The volcanic lair of the evil archmage Keraptis, filled with devious traps and puzzles to protect his stolen treasures.
